schedules.description: Sprint progress report weekday mornings at 7am
Bug killer scan at 10am daily
Bug killer scan at 10pm daily
Open PR maintenance (merge conflicts + review comments) hourly at :03
Teams posting permission audit every Monday at 6am
Bug killer daily activity summary at 1:30am
Gmail scan all mailboxes at 7am daily
Memory consolidation and report at 3am daily
YTD OOF summary report on the last day of each month at 6am
Notes customer ICM daily summary to Teams at 12:30pm weekdays
Meeting Join customer ICM daily summary to Teams at 9am weekdays
Bug-AutoPilot daily summary post to Teams at 7:30am
Hang detection scan every hour at :45
Daily 5W incident report at midnight
Auto-close stale Resolved bugs every Monday at 11:30am
Bug Autopilot Performance Analysis post to Teams at 9pm daily
CoreIdentity entitlement approvals at 8am daily
Feature Flight V2 daily report for direct reports flights, weekdays at noon
Shiproom hygiene: 13 ADO checks at 5am daily
Approve all pending FFv2 flights from directs daily at 9:33pm
Weekly harness performance metrics report every Sunday at 9am
Friday failure review at 6pm -- generates harness improvement candidates
Agent Brain ecosystem health check every Saturday at 2pm
Weekly brain maintenance: archive sessions, compile knowledge, compress, push (Sunday 10pm)
